vision_profile.current_state: Karan is a QA Automation Engineer with 5 years of experience, proficient in Selenium, Java, Postman, and Jenkins basics. He's currently focused on automation scripting.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His primary blockers are skill gaps in test framework architecture, API contract testing, CI/CD pipeline integration, and foundational performance testing, which prevent him from transitioning to a lead SDET role.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Karan aims to be a highly skilled SDET Lead, capable of designing robust test frameworks, implementing comprehensive backend and API contract tests, integrating automation seamlessly into CI/CD pipelines, and initiating performance testing efforts. He envisions his work being recognized as true engineering.
vision_profile.top_motivation: Karan is driven by the desire to elevate QA from a final checklist to a critical engineering discipline, ensuring quality is built in. He wants to avoid repetitive automation by deeply understanding architecture and backend testing.

milestones.identity_statement: Elevate your automation skills from scripting to designing scalable and maintainable test frameworks, laying the groundwork for true engineering impact.

modules.title: Advanced Java for Test Automation
modules.description: Deepen your Java expertise to build more robust, maintainable, and scalable test automation solutions.

skills.description: Learn to apply common design patterns (e.g., Factory, Singleton, Builder) to improve the structure and reusability of your test code.

modules.description: Transition from individual test scripts to architecting a robust, scalable, and maintainable test automation framework.

modules.description: Assemble the components into a cohesive and extensible test framework, ready for advanced integration.

milestones.identity_statement: Master the art of testing APIs and backend services, ensuring robust system integrity and preventing issues before they reach the UI.
milestones.market_value_display: Senior SDET / API Test Lead (15-20 LPA)
